headline: Fidelity National Information Services Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) reported a stronger-than-expected first quarter for 2026, with management pointing to broad financial outperformance, improving margins and accelerating sales momentum across its banking and capital markets businesses.
